review:
I will read the full content of `src/backend/services/claude_session_monitor.py` to understand how `project_name` is derived and ensure the fix is comprehensive.

I will read `src/dashboard/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx` to verify the context of the change and ensure there are no other places where `project_name` might need filtering.

I will search for other occurrences of `project_name` in the dashboard to ensure the fix is applied consistently across all relevant UI components.

I will read `src/dashboard/src/components/claude-sessions/SessionCard.tsx` to check how it handles `project_name` and whether it needs a similar fix to `DashboardPage.tsx`.

ISSUES:
- [severity:info] src/dashboard/src/components/claude-sessions/SessionCard.tsx - The fallback display logic `{session.project_name || session.project_path}` will still render "-" for non-project sessions because `project_path` remains "-" even after the `project_name` is normalized to an empty string. Consider propagating the filtering logic from `DashboardPage.tsx` to other session-related components (`SessionCard`, `SessionDetails`, `ClaudeCodeSessionSelector`) for UI consistency.
- [severity:info] src/backend/services/claude_session_monitor.py:494 - The backend normalization to `""` is correct, but since this value is falsy in JS, existing components using `{session.project_name || 'Unknown Project'}` will now show "Unknown Project" instead of "-", which is a desirable improvement in consistency.

VERDICT: approve
SUMMARY: The changes correctly normalize non-project Claude Code sessions by clearing the "-" placeholder in the backend and hiding it in the main dashboard view, improving the overall user experience.
